info.name: Aeterna E2E Test Suite
info.description:
Exhaustive end-to-end tests for the Aeterna stack via HTTPS ingress.

1. Deployment Validation — health, readiness, liveness, 404 fallback
2. Admin Features & Configuration — OpenSpec discovery, governance, A2A, MCP
3. Realistic Scenario — Full knowledge CRUD lifecycle
4. MCP Protocol — JSON-RPC initialize, tools/list, tools/call, error handling
5. A2A Protocol — Agent card, health, metrics, task submission
6. Webhook Validation — GitHub webhook endpoint error paths
7. Error Validation — Invalid inputs, missing fields, nonexistent resources
8. Knowledge Layer Tests — Multi-layer creation, PR-track governance
9. MCP Governance Tools — Configure, request lifecycle, audit, roles
10. MCP Memory Tools — Add, delete, feedback, close
11. MCP CCA & Sync Tools — Context assemble, note capture, meta-loop, sync
12. MCP Knowledge & Policy Tools — knowledge_get, knowledge_query
